2605.19895.title: Streamlined Constraint Reasoning via CNN Pattern Recognition on Enumerated Solutions
2605.19895.paper_summary: Constraint programming practitioners accelerate hard problems through a layered set of techniques applied in order of risk. Standard hardening (symmetry-breaking and implied constraints) is applied first and preserves satisfiability. Streamliner constraints, which restrict search to a structural sub-family of solutions, do not preserve satisfiability and are reserved as a final lever. Existing automated streamliner-synthesis approaches either search a constraint grammar or prompt a Large Language Model directly on the problem model. We propose a different approach: enumerate feasible solutions, train a Convolutional Neural Network contrastively against perturbed non-solutions to detect structural patterns, and translate the CNN's discriminative signal into candidate MiniZinc streamliners through LLM-driven synthesis. The CNN grounds the LLM's constraint generation in observed solution structure rather than model text alone. We evaluate on hardened benchmark models where streamliner discovery is the residual performance lever. Our pipeline achieves 98.8% portfolio time reduction on hardened Vessel Loading, 98.6% on hardened Social Golfers, and 89.4% on Black Hole, with best-single streamliners reaching geometric-mean speedups of 932x, 356x, and 1103x respectively. Discovered streamliners include class-based packing constraints on Vessel Loading, beyond-hardening canonicalisations on Social Golfers, and layout-coordinate bounds on Black Hole.
2605.19895.paper_summary_zh: 約束編程的實踐者通過一套分層技術來加速困難問題，這些技術按風險順序應用。標準硬化（對稱打破和隱含約束）首先應用，並保持可滿足性。流線型約束限制搜索到結構性子族解，並不保持可滿足性，因此被保留作為最後的手段。現有的自動流線型合成方法要麼搜索約束文法，要麼直接在問題模型上提示大型語言模型。我們提出了一種不同的方法：列舉可行解，對抗性地訓練卷積神經網絡以檢測結構模式，並將CNN的判別信號轉換為候選MiniZinc流線型約束，通過LLM驅動的合成。CNN使LLM的約束生成基於觀察到的解結構，而不僅僅是模型文本。我們在硬化基準模型上進行評估，流線型發現是剩餘性能的杠杆。我們的管道在硬化的船舶裝載上實現了98.8%的時間減少，在硬化的社交高爾夫球手上達到98.6%，在黑洞上達到89.4%，最佳單一流線型約束的幾何平均加速分別達到932倍、356倍和1103倍。發現的流線型約束包括船舶裝載上的基於類別的打包約束、社交高爾夫球手上的超硬化典範化，以及黑洞上的佈局坐標邊界。
2605.19895.author: Patrick Spracklen et.al.
